kiho/no-literal-theme-import.//: Per-rule path scoping uses the same allowedPaths option as the ESLint version.

kiho/no-hex-in-jsx-style.//: Optional project-supplied hex -> token mapping for autofix. Oxlint
kiho/no-hex-in-jsx-style.//1: supports ESLint-style fixers via context.report({ fix }), so this
kiho/no-hex-in-jsx-style.//2: carries over from the ESLint template once eslint-plugin-kiho ships.
